docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FFE $40. SERVED FEB-27-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ANGEL, JACOB
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF BESUMLAK, TESFA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BESUMLAK, TESFA AS TO DEFENDANT ANGEL, JACOB ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-21-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-21-2023 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BESUMLAK, TESFA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANGEL, JACOB $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,115.00, EVIDENCE PRESENTED CLEARLY SHOWS DEFENDANT SCAMMED PLAINTIFF TO USE PLAINTIFF'S CREDIT CARD AND CHASE CARD TO FRAUDULENTLY TAKE OVER $16K BUT PAID NONE OF IT BACK TO PLAINTIFF. DAMAGES ARE REDUCED TO SMALL CLAIMS LIMIT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
